app.title: Myna
app.subtitle: Speak, pronounce, translate and improve — 100% on your PC
theme.title: Toggle theme
lang.title: Interface language
mic.permission: Couldn't access the microphone. Grant permission in the browser.
conv.empty: Tap Start for your first question
conv.detailPh: Detail (optional): role, type of place, location…
conv.reviewHint: Turn this off to send instantly when you stop recording (hands-free).
conv.reviewLabel: This is what I heard — fix it if needed and send:
conv.analysisEmpty: Your analysis will appear here after you answer.
conv.analysisInline: Your corrections appear right under each of your messages, in the chat.
dict.intro: Listen to the English sentence and type it. It's hidden until you check.
text.startHint: Tap the button to generate a sentence with mistakes.
writing.startHint: Pick a type and tap New exercise.
vocab.startHint: Pick a type and tap New exercise.
trans.disputeIntro: Not convinced? Give an instruction about specific words (e.g. “Keep ‘Jabil’ as is, it's a company”) and translate again.
listening.intro: Listen to the audio and answer the question (the text is hidden until the end).
minimal.intro: Listen to the word and pick which one it is among similar-sounding options.
minimal.compare: Tap each word to compare them:
sh.intro: Listen to the sentence and repeat it, imitating the pronunciation. The text is hidden.
fc.empty: No cards yet. Add a word or import your missed words.
repeat.hint: Already did this one: give me a different one
concepts.help: Save expressions you like (e.g. “come up with”) and practice them: the AI builds exercises from YOUR list — fill the gap, multiple choice, or write your own sentence.
concepts.examplePh: Example sentence (optional): where you saw it…
concepts.empty: No expressions yet. Add one to get started.
concepts.startHint: Add expressions and tap Practice to generate exercises from your list.
concepts.gapPh: The expression that fills the blank…
concepts.produceLabel: Write an English sentence using the expression:
prog.medalsHint: Master each level (all skills) to unlock its medal.
settings.modelHint: Bigger = better quality but slower. With a GPU or 16GB+ use 7B; otherwise 3B.
settings.whisperHint: Bigger = understands you better but slower. medium.en is the most accurate (~1.5 GB download the first time).
settings.voiceHint: Choose the (English) voice that speaks to you. Try it before applying.
settings.voiceSample: Hi! I'm your English tutor. Let's practice together.
settings.noRestart: Switching model is instant (no restart needed).
settings.deviceHint: GPU is faster; use CPU if the GPU has issues.
settings.noGpu: No GPU detected; CPU will be used.
settings.whisperCpuOnly: Whisper only accelerates on NVIDIA (CUDA); it will run on CPU on your machine.
settings.catalogHint: We show what fits your machine (~{budget} GB). Bigger = better; dimmed ones don't fit.
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete this model? It frees disk space.
settings.reminderHint: Notifies you at the time you choose, even when Myna is closed. Click it to open the app.
home.title: What do you want to practice today?
home.subtitle: Pick a module. Each one trains a different skill.
mod.conv.desc: Talk to a tutor by voice in real scenarios; instant corrections.
mod.read.desc: Read sentences aloud and measure your pronunciation word by word.
mod.shadowing.desc: Listen to a sentence and repeat it, imitating the pronunciation.
mod.dictation.desc: Listen and type what you hear (ear and spelling).
mod.listening.desc: Listen to audio and answer comprehension questions.
mod.minimal.desc: Hear a word and pick it out from others that sound almost the same (minimal pairs).
mod.text.desc: Fix sentences with mistakes to reinforce grammar.
mod.writing.desc: Rewrite, translate, complete sentences or write a paragraph; the AI checks it.
mod.vocab.desc: Verb tenses, synonyms, antonyms, prepositions and phrasal verbs.
mod.concepts.desc: Save expressions you like and practice them with exercises built from your list.
mod.mixed.desc: Varied review focused on the words you miss the most.
mod.trans.desc: Translate ES↔EN with synonyms, examples and audio.
mod.progress.desc: Your progress: points, streak, words to review and activity.
mod.settings.desc: AI model, speech model and your system info.
levelup.msg: You've mastered this level. Move up to
mixed.intro: Review with the words you miss the most. Getting them right removes them from your list.
mixed.empty: You don't have missed words yet. Practice a bit and come back!
rec.title: For you
rec.progressHint: To level up (and earn the medal): in each area ≥{areaNeed} exercises and ≥{floor}% average, and ≥{need} in total with ≥{avg}% overall average. ✓ means the area is done; the % is your current average.
onb.title: Welcome!
onb.p1: 🗣️ Practice English with an AI tutor, 100% on your PC.
onb.p2: 🎚️ Pick your level (A1–C2). When you master it, we suggest moving up.
fc.help: How it works: look at the word, try to recall its meaning and tap "Show". Then rate: "Again" (you'll see it soon), "Good" (in a few days) or "Easy" (later). You review exactly what you struggle with.
